productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Handbags
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from united colors of benetton. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Sling it on as a handbag or a tote and revel in stylish comfort both ways.Length: 34 cmWidth: 11 cmWidth: 39 cmOuter made of 100% nylon, trimmings made of 100% PU and has a 100% polyester inner liningOne roomy zippered compartment with a mobile pouch, a spacious pouch and a zippered compartment on the insideHas two pouches with a doggle strap, two zippered pouches and two compartments with magnetic button closures on the frontSynthetic twill tape shoulder straps with a long removable strapExternal zipper to create extra spaceCareWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
